mapper.sql: id, version_id, package_id, snapshot_version, content_hash, parent_snapshot_id, resolved_objects, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM domain_package_runtime_snapshot WHERE version_id = #{versionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM domain_package_runtime_snapshot WHERE package_id = #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_package_runtime_snapshot (id, version_id, package_id, snapshot_version, content_hash, parent_snapshot_id, resolved_objects, created_at) VALUES (#{snapshotId}, #{versionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{snapshotVersion}, #{contentHash}, #{parentSnapshotId}, #{resolvedObjectsJson}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
